title: Fractures - Potions
body:
Minecraft Resource Pack that makes all Potions & Tipped Arrows visually distinct!

Please note that the visually distinct potion textures will only work from 1.21.5 onwards. The pack is  compatible with prior versions for the base texture changes.

**To use the Texture Pack move the zip file to the Minecraft Resource Pack folder (User > AppData > Roaming > .minecraft > resourcepacks), right click the zip file, and select "Extract All". The Texture Pack should now show up in Minecraft!**

_(you can also locate the folder by going to Resource Packs in the Minecraft Options and selecting the "Open Pack Folder" Button on the bottom left of the Screen, where you can then Copy/Cut & Paste the file)_

**Note that this Pack only works for Minecraft: Java Edition**
